title: Marksman 3 Arm Rotating Sprinkler - Floor
features: EFFORTLESS LAWN WATERING: 3-arm rotating sprinkler provides even water distribution for gardens and lawns.
360° ROTATION: Covers a wide area with adjustable spray distance for efficient watering.
DURABLE & STURDY: Made from high-quality plastic for long-lasting use.
EASY TO USE: Simply connect to a standard garden hose for quick setup.
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Ideal for lawns, flower beds, vegetable patches, and more.
FLOOR-BASED STABILITY: Sits securely on the ground for steady operation.
description: The Marksman 3-Arm Rotating Sprinkler is a reliable and efficient watering solution for your garden, lawn, or flower beds. Featuring 360° rotation, it provides even water distribution to ensure healthy plant growth. The durable plastic construction offers long-lasting performance, while the floor-based design ensures stability during operation. This sprinkler is easy to set up, simply connecting to a standard garden hose for immediate use. Whether you're maintaining a lush green lawn or watering delicate plants, this water-efficient sprinkler helps keep your garden thriving with minimal effort.
